summary: Frontend testing for 6 new features: Sort pills on Engins page, Page transition animations, Rapports 3-panel layout with Par Engin/Par Site types. All features verified through UI testing.

minor.issue: Slow response times (5-15s) - external dependency, not a code issue

integration_issues.issue: Clicking on rapport vignette shows empty state instead of loading data. The fetchListRptById is called but data doesn't appear in RapportDisplay. May be external API issue or data not available for selected rapport.

sort_pills_engins.sort_by_nom: PASS - First card changed from 'VEN111-2' to 'Machine a Café1234' (alphabetical)
sort_pills_engins.sort_by_batterie: PASS - Active pill highlighted, cards sorted by battery level
sort_pills_engins.active_state: PASS - .lt-sort-pill--active class applied to selected pill

page_animations.lt_page_class: PASS - .lt-page class present for fade-in animation
page_animations.staggered_animation: PASS - .lt-vcard cards have animation-delay for staggered effect
page_animations.css_keyframes: VERIFIED in code - lt-page-in, lt-fade-in, lt-card-in animations defined

rapports_types_panel.create_button: PASS - 'Créer un rapport' button found and clickable

rapports_par_engin_config.info_card: PASS - Blue info card with 'Rapport par Engin' description

rapports_par_site_config.site_items: PASS - 39 site items (Logitrak 2, JORF OCP, Depot4, etc.)

rapports_display.vignettes_grid: PASS - 214 rapport vignettes in grid view
rapports_display.vignette_click: PARTIAL - Click selects vignette but data doesn't load in display panel

dashboard_regression.kpi_cards: PASS - 4 KPI cards (11/4935 Engins, 12/53 Tags, 1/4935 Engins, 1/53 Tags)
dashboard_regression.period_filters: PASS - 5 filter pills (Tout, Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours, Personnalisé)

code_review_verification.EnginList.js: Sort pills with gridSort state, .lt-sort-pills container, sorting logic for name/battery/status
code_review_verification.RapportChose.jsx: Report types panel with 'Par Engin' and 'Par Site' under 'RAPPORT D'ACTIVITÉ' category
code_review_verification.ListEngRpt.jsx: Device selection with checkboxes, search, select all functionality
code_review_verification.DateSettings.jsx: Config panel with auto-generated title, date range picker, blue info card
code_review_verification.RapportDisplay.jsx: Summary display with grouping and 'Au total' card (data-testid attributes present)
code_review_verification.logitag-saas.css: All CSS for sort pills (.lt-sort-pills, .lt-sort-pill--active), animations (lt-page-in, lt-card-in), rapport panels

action_items: Investigate why clicking on rapport vignette doesn't load data in RapportDisplay - may be external API issue or data format mismatch
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features tested: Sort pills on Engins page working (Défaut/Nom/Batterie/Statut), Page animations present (lt-page-in, lt-card-in), Rapports 3-panel layout working with Par Engin (31 engins) and Par Site (39 sites) types. Dashboard regression passed. One minor issue: clicking on rapport vignette selects it but doesn't load data in display panel - may be external API issue. External API (omniyat.is-certified.com) has slow response times (5-15s).
